files.patch:
@@ -84,7 +84,7 @@ installed, auto mode can use local CLI models when `cli.enabled` is set (see `do
 
 - Video and podcast summaries ignore sponsor/ads/promotional segments; do not include them in the summary.
 - Do not mention sponsor/ads or that they were skipped.
-- Include 1-2 short direct quotes (quotation marks + Markdown italics using underscore or asterisk markers) only when a standout line is present; otherwise omit quotes. Do not use quotation marks unless italicized; avoid quotation marks for single words or emphasis. Never mention ads/sponsors/boilerplate or that you skipped/ignored them.
+- Include 1-2 short direct quotes (quotation marks + Markdown italics) only when a standout line is present; otherwise omit quotes. Wrap each quoted passage in underscores so the quotation marks are italicized. Do not use quotation marks unless italicized; avoid quotation marks for single words or emphasis. Never mention ads/sponsors/boilerplate or that you skipped/ignored them.
 - Final check: remove sponsor/ad references and remove any non-italic quotes.
 
 ## Z.AI

@@ -67,7 +67,7 @@ export function buildFileSummaryPrompt({
     directive.formatting,
     'Format the answer in Markdown.',
     'Use short paragraphs; use bullet lists only when they improve scanability; avoid rigid templates.',
-    'When there is a standout line, include 1-2 short direct quotes (max 25 words each) in quotation marks and Markdown italics (use underscore or asterisk markers). If you cannot italicize a quote, omit it. Do not use quotation marks unless the quoted text is italicized; avoid quotation marks for single words or emphasis. Never quote ads, sponsors, or boilerplate, and never mention them or that you skipped/ignored them.',
+    'When there is a standout line, include 1-2 short direct quotes (max 25 words each) in quotation marks and Markdown italics. Wrap each quoted passage in underscores so the quotation marks are italicized. If you cannot italicize a quote, omit it. Do not use quotation marks unless the quoted text is italicized; avoid quotation marks for single words or emphasis. Never quote ads, sponsors, or boilerplate, and never mention them or that you skipped/ignored them.',
     'Do not use emojis.',
     presetLengthLine,
     maxCharactersLine,
@@ -154,7 +154,7 @@ export function buildFileTextSummaryPrompt({
     directive.formatting,
     'Format the answer in Markdown.',
     'Use short paragraphs; use bullet lists only when they improve scanability; avoid rigid templates.',
-    'When there is a standout line, include 1-2 short direct quotes (max 25 words each) in quotation marks and Markdown italics (use underscore or asterisk markers). If you cannot italicize a quote, omit it. Do not use quotation marks unless the quoted text is italicized; avoid quotation marks for single words or emphasis. Never quote ads, sponsors, or boilerplate, and never mention them or that you skipped/ignored them.',
+    'When there is a standout line, include 1-2 short direct quotes (max 25 words each) in quotation marks and Markdown italics. Wrap each quoted passage in underscores so the quotation marks are italicized. If you cannot italicize a quote, omit it. Do not use quotation marks unless the quoted text is italicized; avoid quotation marks for single words or emphasis. Never quote ads, sponsors, or boilerplate, and never mention them or that you skipped/ignored them.',
     'Do not use emojis.',
     presetLengthLine,
     maxCharactersLine,
